title: Info Name Tags
description: Displays a LOT of useful and debug entity information on the name tag!
body:
# **Info Name Tags mod**

This mod displays entity information that the client receives and tracks, but the player cannot see.

This includes things like the entity's health, absorption, item use time (and how much is remaining!), remaining air (yes, you can see how long other players can remain underwater for with this mod!), last source of damage, gamemode, main hand, team, vehicle and more!


## Dependencies

This mod requires [Fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), and [Cloth config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) + [Mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for configuration.
